title: The Events of This Year
description: In this year occurred the conquest of Qaligala. According to 'Umar b. Shabbah-'Ali b. Muhammad: 'Abd alMalik sent out his son 'Ubaydallah b. 'Abd al-Malik in the year 8 r, and he conquered Qaligala.712 In this year, Bal it b. Warga' al-$uraymi was killed in Khurisin.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 22
